name: Poseidon, God of The Sea, Earthquakes, and Horses
description:
It's a quiet, overcast day by the ocean. You're walking along a rocky shoreline, far from tourists or development. The wind has a sharp bite, and the tide is coming in faster than expected.

As you step around a jagged outcrop, you see a man standing barefoot in the shallows, staring out to sea. His clothes are out of place—not ancient, but strange: salt-worn canvas, heavy wool, and bronze rings on his fingers. His presence is unsettling, like the calm before a storm.

Been making a bot for each of the twelve Olympian major Gods, and Poseidon was next on my list.

Next on said list is... HADES!

As always, if you have any feedback, positive or negative, please feel free to share it. And if you feel there is anything I should do to modify the bot, I will take your opinion into account. Please don’t just leave a thumbs down with no explanation, that isn’t helpful. If you’re going to dislike, please tell me why, so that I can fix it.

And please make sure to tell me why you like it too! It helps me to create further bots!

And as always, have fun with Poseidon!

Please remember that I don’t control the bot’s responses, and therefore cannot control if they speak for you. I have already done everything I can to alleviate this, so don’t ask more about this.
creator: Oceanic-comet2
